nodes.label: iPhone 15 Pro White Titanium device frame
nodes.source_file: Maya/Assets.xcassets/iphone frames/iPhone 15 Pro - White Titanium.imageset/iPhone 15 Pro - White Titanium.png
nodes.description: iPhone 15 Pro device frame in White Titanium color. PNG with a transparent screen cutout. The bezel has a white/silver titanium finish. Used in the Maya app for wrapping screen recordings with a white titanium iPhone 15 Pro bezel overlay.
